# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: UI polish meets AI assist enhancements
- Summary: Highlighting recent UI refinements alongside upgraded AI assistant capabilities to boost coding practice and problem-solving workflows.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now blends a smoother UI with enhanced AI-assisted problem solving, enabling faster context switching, clearer feedback, and a more engaging learning loop for DS&A practice.
- CTA: Try the updated UI and AI helper in your next practice session on CodeGrind.
- Visual brief: Static, clean screenshot-style image showing the CodeGrind code editor with AI chat panel and updated UI elements (neon cyberpunk accents, clear problem pane, responsive layout). Include subtle indicators of AI guidance and problem-solving workflow.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
